description: Fitting builder currently shows raw DPS only. Add a damage profile selector (EM/Therm/Kin/Exp distribution) and recompute DPS against the target's resists. Provide presets (Sansha, Blood Raiders, Guristas, Serpentis, Angels, NPC default, Player average). Display both raw and resist-weighted DPS in the offense panel.
title: Fitting: damage profile UI for resist-weighted DPS
